titleStmt.title: SII 26.586: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 586. (A.R. No. 556 of 1909.) KĀREṀPŪḌI, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the court-yard of the temple of heroes' (Vīrula-guḍi).

p.hi: Śaka 1318, Yuva, Āshāḍhā śu. 11, Friday = 1395 A.D., June 29, The weekday was Tuesday.

summary.p: This records an agreement entered into between the Baḍagas (northerners) and the Palnāḍ people with regard to the privilege of using kuṁkuma, vasaṁtam, in the course of worship of their deities. Both the parties were summoned to the presence of Nallāni Gōviṁda Chakravarti-ayyaṁgār who settled the dispute amicably. Since the Baḍagas could not establish their customary rights which obviously the Palnāḍ people did, it was decided that the former were not to use kuṁkuma and Vasaṁta and that where they did use, the Palnāḍ people had the right to prevent them from doing so. To this effect the order was issued to the śrīvaishṇavas of the eighteen countries by Nallāni Chakravarti, who is described to have borne a number of epithets such as vēdamārga-pratishṭhāchāryya, chakragola-vijya-chūḍāmaṇi, māyāvādi, kōḷāhala, maṁtravādi-bhayaṁkkara, paramavaidika, sārvvabhauma, śriṁgāra, hara-śaraṇāgata-vajrapamjara, Śrī Ahōbaladēva vibhasa-virōdhi-mānamardana-Tiruveṁggaḷa-nāthadēva-divya-śrīpāda-padma, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakavarusaṁbulu 1318 Āgunēṁṭi
ṭi yuva saṁvatsara Aṣāḍha śu 11 śu .
śrī nallāni cakrava¨rtulu [I]ccina
śāsanamu .
[da¨rśa]nē da¨rśanē saṁttinivādāḥsa¨rvavādināṁ.sammataṁ ¨rvvalōkānā
ṁ da¨rśanaṁ cakrava¨rtināṁ . svasti śrīmatu vēdamā¨rga pratiṣṭā
cā¨ryyaṁ cakragola vijaya cūḍāmaṇi duṣṭa
nigraha niṣa pratipālaka māyāvādi kōḷāhaḷa maṁ
travādi bhayaṁkkara . paramavai dika sārvabhau(vu)ma paravā
di gajakesari tribhuvana nirāḷa samudra viḷaṁba tāḷagita śri
ṁgārahāra śaraṇagata vajrapaṁjara śrī Ahōbaladēva vibhava virō
dhīmāna ma[¨rda]na tiruveṁggaḷanāthadēva divyaśrī pādapadmā
rādu (thaku)laina śrīnalānu gōviṁdacakrava¨rti Ayyaṁgāru Akhīlalō
(lō)kāla paduneṭṭināṁṭi śrīvaiṣṇūlakunu Anaticci putteṁcina
śrīmukhaṁ . baḍagula sivālavāru tamakuṁ guṁkkuma vasa
ṁttaṁ mugaldani dēvacakrava¨rtti Ayyaṁgārikini maṟaguvaḍa vinnapaṁ
sēsi śrīmukhālu decci vasaṁttamādēmanaṁgānu palinā
ṁḍivāru vasaṁttaṁ Aḍanīka Aḍḍapeṭṭitēnu nēmuśattaṁ
ḍamuvārinni mā muṁddaḍiki rappiṁcci vicāriṁ^1^ppa
ṁgānu palināṁḍivāru pū¨rvamaṁddu kuṁkkuma vasa
ṁtaṁ baḍugulavārkiṁ galugaṁ delupukoni Āḍa
nimmaṁṭṭēnu A baḍagulavāru pū¨rvamaṁddu galu
gaṁ delupalērayirigāna dēvacakrava¨rti Ayyaṁgā
ru yicchina śrīmukhālu magaḍaṁ bucchiko
ni nēmu palināṁḍivārki mana dēvarakuṁjelleṭi
vaibhōgālu [A]nninniṁ celliṁci Uppurapu goguḍulu
Alavaṭṭilūnu kanakadaṁḍe Āṁddhalamūnu
kāma śigiḷūnu niti goḍugulūnu coḍapa
ṁḍiḷū nu tipuṁḍāpaḷanāṁtulunu tiru
paḷivolalunnu tiruviḍi vottulunnu Anuma
regalunnuṁyistimi vāri śrīmukhālu
veṭṭi timigāna mīru yekkaḍa baḍagula marugu
ṁkkuma vasaṁtta Aḍinānu paduneṭṭināṁṭi śrīvai
ṣṇūlūnu kuṁkkuma vasaṁttaṁ Āḍanika Aḍḍa
peṭṭēdi yī śāsanaṁ vuddagilōnuṁḍagaligite
nu vāru paṁpi nnu meḍapijeḍeṭo
ḍunu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrīṁjeyu
nu .
Digital edition of SII 26.586 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
